message:
🐛 Only show preview URL when Netlify deploy is actually ready (#1221)

The preview URL was being constructed deterministically from the PR
number as soon as a linked PR was found. This caused "Preview Available"
to appear in the UI before Netlify had finished building the deploy
preview. Now preview URLs come from the DB record, which is only
populated by the deployment_status webhook when Netlify reports success.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
